intent: Add frontend fluid sizing governance and convert PR1 shared/upload/common visible fixed dimensions to responsive sizing.
assumptions: This is the first staged PR, not the complete frontend-wide cleanup.
Clamp upper bounds preserve the existing desktop visual size.
Existing upload dialog mobile spacing changes must be preserved.
risks: Visual parity still needs screenshot verification beyond CSS contract tests.
Virtualized list intrinsic-size fallback must stay close to the old value.
Remaining frontend domains need follow-up PRs.
steps: Add failing tests for the fluid sizing governance script.
Convert PR1 fixed visible dimensions to clamp/rem/semantic values.
Extend upload dialog layout contract tests.
Document the permanent constraint and quality score.
Run check:fluid-sizing, targeted tests, lint, and build.
